description: Paste any text and hear it read back in 5 distinct browser speech personas side by side. No backend, no API keys — pure Web Speech API.
features: 5 distinct voice personas: Narrator, Robot, Auctioneer, Whisper, Valley Girl
Play individual personas or sequence all 5 with Play All
Active card highlighting with sound wave animation
Fully client-side — zero backend, zero API keys
Dark mode UI with per-persona color theming
